What We Do

Tailored services
for the discerning traveller.

From your first arrival to the last transfer, every detail is handled locally and executed with precision — across the entire Balkan region.

01

VIP Airport Transfers

Meet & greet, premium vehicles, multi-country routes. Sofia, Plovdiv, Thessaloniki, Belgrade, Athens — coordinated seamlessly.

Enquire now
02

On-Call Private Driver

Your dedicated driver, available on demand. Day trips, evening transfers, multi-day itineraries — always discreet, always punctual.

Enquire now
03

Property & Owner Support

Inspections, key management, maintenance coordination, arrival preparation. Your property looked after whether you're in London or Dubai.

Enquire now
04

Private Chef & SPA

In-residence dining experiences, private wellness retreats and spa arrangements — curated for complete privacy and refined taste.

Enquire now
05

Ski Services

Equipment rental, lift pass coordination, ski school booking and mountain transfers in Bansko, Borovets, Kopaonik and beyond.

Enquire now
06

Bespoke Experiences

Wine tours in Thrace, Adriatic coastal trips, cultural immersions in Sofia and Belgrade, yacht charters on the Black Sea. Crafted entirely around you.

Enquire now
Concierge Packages

Choose your level
of coordination.

Structured support tailored to the length and complexity of your stay. All packages are built around a single, reliable point of contact.

Prime Weekend
2–3 Days

Essential local support for short stays and weekend visits across Balkan key destinations.

  • Dedicated local host throughout your stay
  • Airport or arrival transfer coordination
  • Restaurant reservations & local recommendations
  • On-call WhatsApp support (08:00–22:00)
On request — tailored to your stay
WhatsApp to enquire
Most Requested
Executive 5-Day
4–6 Days

Ideal for families, couples and small groups who value structured, reliable coordination over several days.

  • Ongoing daily coordination for the full stay
  • All transfers arranged with licensed partners
  • Lifestyle, travel & experience assistance
  • One consistent point of contact throughout
  • Property check-in preparation if needed
On request — flexible to requirements
WhatsApp to enquire
Elite 7-Day Bespoke
7+ Days

A fully tailored concierge experience for guests who expect seamless coordination, total privacy and maximum flexibility.

  • Fully bespoke planning from arrival to departure
  • Priority access to exclusive local partners
  • Multi-destination coordination across the Balkans
  • Complete discretion — all requests handled personally
  • Available for group stays, special occasions & corporate
On request — bespoke pricing
WhatsApp to enquire
Why Bansko Concierge VIP

Locally based.
Internationally minded.

Every service is delivered by a Diploma Engineer with 15+ years of international hotel construction experience — bringing a level of precision and reliability rarely found in the region.

Transparent — No Hidden Commissions

What you pay is what the service costs. No markups, no third-party referral fees. Just honest, direct coordination.

Same-Day Response

Enquiries are answered the same day. No automated replies, no waiting — direct access to Andreas via WhatsApp.

Licensed & Trusted Partners Only

Every driver, chef, ski instructor and property contractor is personally vetted. Your safety and comfort are non-negotiable.

EN · DE · BG · RU

Clear, professional communication in four languages. No misunderstandings, no lost in translation moments.

"

Having a single, reliable contact who actually knows the region made all the difference. Everything from the airport to our chalet was handled flawlessly — without us having to think about it once.
